description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular design with a dark matte finish and distinct geometric lines along the barrel and receiver. The upper section of the barrel is adorned with a series of triangular cutouts, likely for weight reduction or heat dissipation, while the lower rail appears reinforced and solid. The stock is straight and blocky, with a pronounced pistol grip and a squared-off butt, suggesting a utilitarian, tactical style. The magazine is not externally visible, indicating it may be internal or omitted in this depiction. The sighting system is minimal, with a raised section on top of the receiver that could serve as a basic iron sight. The overall construction suggests a modern, possibly fictional or stylized urban combat rifle.
description: A dark, angular rifle with geometric cutouts along the barrel, a blocky stock, and a minimal sighting system, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the triangular barrel cutouts, blocky stock, and pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the upper and lower rails.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the same geometric features and overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the squared-off buttstock and the back of the receiver, with minimal detail on the sighting system.
